description: Expand accelerator work to discrete GPU backends once integrated GPU evidence exists.
decision_reason: Colab T4 evidence confirms JAX GPU visibility and EVPI parity for the compact validation workload, but no confirmed discrete-ready Apple Metal or production-sized speedup has been demonstrated, so this track remains feasibility-only.
next_action: Retain in feasibility-only mode and re-open only after a reproducible `apple_metal_vs_cpu` or large JAX GPU speedup is collected.
